title: Shape Memory Alloy Nitinol Thermal Actuation Characteristics
content: Nitinol SMA wire contracts ~4% when Joule-heated above austenite start (~70°C) and relaxes below martensite finish (~40°C). The thermal hysteresis between heating and cooling curves demands hysteresis-band PID control to prevent actuator chatter. Current density 200-300 mA/mm² produces full actuation in 0.5-2 s depending on wire diameter and ambient cooling.
